ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of products ordered */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Delivered, Cancelled, Pending) */,
  "shipped_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was shipped */,
  "completed_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was completed */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number provided by the shipping provider */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "cancel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation (if applicable) */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for return (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Default shipping address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer is enrolled in */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase made by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Number of products in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the product information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the product was ordered in */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_providers" (
  "shipping_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping provider */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the shipping provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the shipping provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the shipping provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping provider used */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was made */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "tracking_url" TEXT /* URL for tracking the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment (e.g., In Transit, Delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_shipping_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_provider_id") REFERENCES shipping_providers ("shipping_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being cancelled */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cancellation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "cancellation_status" TEXT /* Status of the cancellation (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Number of points required to achieve the loyalty program level */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)
